title: Preserve direct-hierarchy reporting across wake provenance
intent: Prove across separately reset cases that a domain supervisor stays off the principal channel after foreign coordination and owned child-status wakes, reports only a new material owned outcome through its direct parent, and remains conversational for held-out direct principal intervention.

roles.responsibilities: Provide only the predeclared held-out direct intervention and inspect the independently verified outcome.
Own the direct hierarchy edge above the domain supervisor, receive its durable material report, and send one ordinary durable request in the held-out case.
Supervise only its owned domain, distinguish non-human wake provenance from direct principal intervention, and preserve durable direct-hierarchy accountability.
Produce the one predeclared material owned outcome that completes the native child-status predicate in its case.

starting_state.description: Three separately reset copies of one disposable organization expose durable direct-parent reporting, an authoritative attached terminal, a real coordination listener, native child-status predicates and intentionally globally readable foreign state.
required_state: The foreign-coordination case has no new owned outcome; one unrelated out-of-domain durable event completes the domain supervisor's actual coordination listener.
The owned-child-status case has exactly one new material domain-worker outcome with no prior parent report; the corresponding native one-shot child-status predicate completes.
The held-out direct-principal case has no injected non-human wake; it delivers one supported direct principal intervention and one ordinary durable request from the parent supervisor.
At least one unresolved foreign item is globally readable by the domain supervisor but is proven not manageable by it in every case.
Before each case, every useful one-shot coordination and child-status predicate is armed and its identity is independently observable.
Terminal output, durable hierarchy deliveries, foreign-state mutations, parent-request processing, global reads and predicate re-arming are independently observable.

requirements: Three separately reset subject instances or three sequential resets of one organization with a direct parent, domain supervisor and domain worker
One authoritative attached terminal that distinguishes supported direct-human input from custom lifecycle events
Actual one-shot coordination and native child-status wait interfaces with observable completion and re-arming
Durable reporting and request authorities with observable sender, recipient, read and resolution state
Globally readable foreign state with authoritative per-domain manageability checks
permissions: Create only the synthetic owned outcome, foreign event, foreign readable state and ordinary parent request declared for each case
Complete the actual coordination listener in the foreign case and the actual native child-status wait in the owned case
Submit one direct principal intervention only in the held-out case
Inspect bounded terminal output, durable hierarchy state, parent-request processing, foreign state, read authorization and wait lifecycle
Do not mutate production state, hide foreign rows, grant broader manageability, reload instructions, merge, or deploy

acceptance_criteria.description: The foreign coordination wake produces no principal-facing terminal prose.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Bound terminal evidence from listener completion through the quiescent boundary contains no principal-directed response, update, choice or request.

acceptance_criteria.description: The foreign coordination wake creates zero new durable hierarchy reports because there is no new owned outcome.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Compare authoritative hierarchy deliveries before and after the case and require zero new reports from the domain supervisor.

acceptance_criteria.description: Foreign state remains globally readable, unchanged and unpresented as owned work.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Compare pre-case and post-case foreign state and manageability checks, repeat the authorized global read, and inspect terminal and durable delivery evidence for absence of presentation or action.

acceptance_criteria.description: The owned child-status wake represents the one material owned outcome in exactly one durable report to the domain supervisor's direct parent.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Query authoritative hierarchy state for exactly one outcome-linked report with the domain supervisor as sender and its direct parent as recipient.

acceptance_criteria.description: The owned child-status wake produces no principal-facing terminal prose, including after its durable report.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Bound terminal evidence from child-status completion through report insertion and the quiescent boundary contains no principal-directed response, update, choice or request.

acceptance_criteria.description: After the owned child-status wake, every still-useful one-shot continuity and child-status predicate is re-armed.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Compare the declared useful predicate set with independently observed running wait identities after reconciliation; a completed one-shot identity does not count as re-armed.

acceptance_criteria.description: In the held-out case, supported direct principal intervention receives a conversational response in the attached terminal.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Correlate the direct-human input event with one bounded terminal response from the domain supervisor.

acceptance_criteria.description: Any material instruction in the held-out direct intervention is reconciled into durable owned state.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Resolve the held-out instruction to its authoritative accepted-work, ownership, request or equivalent durable state change.

acceptance_criteria.description: The held-out ordinary durable parent request is loaded and resolved through the subject's normal interface.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Inspect authoritative request receipt and resolution state for the predeclared parent delivery.

acceptance_criteria.description: Evidence distinguishes all three reset cases and resolves terminal, hierarchy, durable-request, foreign-read, manageability and wait-lifecycle observations without private reasoning.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Validate the evidence bundle and resolve every cited native-authority reference for all three cases.

completion_boundary: All three separately reset cases are independently verified: the foreign coordination wake is terminal-silent with no hierarchy report, unchanged readable foreign state and no new owned outcome; the owned child-status wake is terminal-silent with exactly one direct-parent report and every still-useful one-shot predicate re-armed; the held-out direct intervention is conversational and durably reconciled; ordinary parent-request processing succeeds; and no instruction reload or deployment occurs.
